pagination.mechanism: Click anchor with class 'c-get-more__button' and text 'Fler Nyheter'; URL pattern: ?page=2#page-2, ?page=3#page-3 etc.

requires_subpages.reason: Listing page shows only title and publication date. Bygglov-items have empty description paragraphs. Case number, address, property designation, and permit details are only available on individual subpages.

item_filter.notes: Only items where title contains 'Bygglov' are relevant. Other types (samråd, antagande, underrättelse) are detaljplan notices, not bygglov.

notes: Page uses standard HTML list rendering with no JavaScript-required content on the listing level. Pagination is a plain anchor link appending ?page=N, not JS-driven. Bygglov entries have empty description text on the list page — subpages must be fetched. Non-bygglov entries (detaljplan samråd/antagande) should be skipped. datetime attribute on <time> element is ISO 8601 and reliable for published date.
